title: DeployTriggerOpts
description: Request options for deploying a trigger

version.description: Optional trigger component version (in SemVer format, for example '1.0.0'), defaults to latest

workflow_id.description: Optional ID of a workflow to receive trigger events

webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL to receive trigger events

emit_on_deploy.description: Whether the trigger should emit events during the deploy hook execution. Defaults to true if not specified.
